mapper.select: SELECT LC.LEARN_ID AS ID, LL.CLASS_ID, #{studentId} AS STUDENT_ID, LC.TITLE, CASE WHEN LC.ATTACH_URL IS NOT NULL AND (INSTR(LOWER(LC.ATTACH_URL), 'http://') = 1 OR INSTR(LOWER(LC.ATTACH_URL), 'https://') = 1) THEN 'link' WHEN LC.GUIDE_POINT IS NOT NULL THEN 'text' ELSE 'video' END AS TYPE, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.REQUIRED_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS REQUIRED, CASE WHEN LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN '완료' WHEN LP.STATUS IS NOT NULL THEN '진행중' ELSE '미시작' END AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE, NVL(TO_CHAR(LC.TARGET_TIME), '0') || '분' AS DURATION, CASE WHEN LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 100 WHEN LP.STATUS IS NOT NULL THEN NVL(LP.PROGRESS_RATE, 50) ELSE 0 END AS PROGRESS, LC.CONTENT, LC.GUIDE_POINT AS TEXT_CONTENT, LC.ATTACH_URL AS LINK_URL, TO_CHAR(LC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID LEFT JOIN LEARN_PRO LP ON LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ORDER BY LC.START_DATE DESC, LC.LEARN_ID DESC
